title: Notifies Computer Forensic and Data Mining Laboratory under Serious Fraud Investigation Office, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, New Delhi as Examiner of Electronic Evidence within India with the scope of Computer (Media) Forensics excluding Floppy Disk Drive.
description: Notifies Computer Forensic and Data Mining Laboratory under Serious Fraud Investigation Office, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, New Delhi as Examiner of Electronic Evidence within India with the scope of Computer (Media) Forensics excluding Floppy Disk Drive.

(अ).—सूचना 灹ौ獸ोिगक琉 अिधिनयम, 2000 (2000 का 21वां) क琉 धारा 79क 獧ारा 灹द牵 शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए, के瀈灶 सरकार एत獵ारा गंभीर कपट अ瀈वेषण काया榁लय, कॉप犙रेट काय榁 मं灴ालय, नई 琈द瀖ली के अधीन क瀓瀉यूटर 瀈यायिव榀ान और डेटा माइ琐नंग 灹योगशाला को भारत म犆 क瀓瀉यूटर (मीिडया) 瀈यायिव榀ान- 瀐लॉपी िड瀡क 灱ाइव को छोड़कर के काय榁楹े灴 के साथ इले榉灩ॉिनक सा瀣य के परी楹क के तौर पर अिधसूिचत करती है । [सं. 1(13)/2015-सीएलएफ़ई] एस. गोपालकृ瀠णन, संयु猴 सिचव MINISTRY OF ELECTRONICS AND INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 26th March, 2018 S.O. 1413(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 79A of the Information Technology Act 2000 (21 of 2000), the Central Government hereby notifies Computer Forensic and Data Mining Laboratory under Serious Fraud Investigation Office, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, New Delhi as Examiner of Electronic Evidence within India with the scope of Computer (Media) Forensics excluding Floppy Disk Drive. [No. 1(13)/2015-CLFE] S. GOPALAKRISHNAN, Jt.
